default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content updates, and ongoing challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content templates updated and staged; employee engagement survey template pending](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [SEO metrics show mixed results: lower impressions but increased clicks; significant gains in top 10 keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Three specific pages not indexing despite efforts; potential crawl budget or quality ratio concerns](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Q4 historically slow for Yourco, but aiming for month-over-month growth](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Template Revisions

  - [All but one template (employee engagement survey) updated to new standardized format](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Templates now stored in public-facing folder for easy linking](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Next week's articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Building content padding for end-of-year absence](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Google update effects: lower impressions, increased clicks](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Keyword rankings: significant drop in page 4 keywords, but gains in top 10 and 11-20 rankings](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Subcluster performance: Open enrollment (+400% sessions), templates, scheduling, and call-offs showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Conversion data: Spike in free trial signups (40-50 new accounts from one customer)](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [10 leads from SEO this month, consistent with previous performance](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Indexing Challenges

  - [Three pages not indexing: work order system (older), free onboarding templates in Chinese and Tagalog](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Possible causes discussed: crawl budget, quality ratio, trailing slash issues](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Consideration of changing slugs or consolidating content to address](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Website Crawl and Index Status

  - [331 pages with redirects, many due to trailing slash issues](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Positive trend in pages crawled but not indexed](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Discussion on potential content consolidation project to improve overall site quality and crawl efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Upcoming Feature: Frontline Intelligence

  - [Preliminary research paused pending more details](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Jessica to share product brief next week for targeted content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Change slugs for non-indexing pages to test if it resolves the issue](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Monitor indexation trends closely](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Consider a content consolidation project in the coming months](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Jessica to share details on new Frontline Intelligence feature next week](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Carrie to resume preliminary research on Frontline Intelligence after receiving product brief](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Continue focus on closing Q4 strong despite historical slowdown](https://fathom.video/share/3F86GUPCixmwLojGt6sP1Wh5npmV6Zrr?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)

action_items.description: Change slugs for unindexed articles (Chinese/Tagalog onboarding templates). Update internal links accordingly.
Resume research on frontline intelligence feature after receiving product brief from Jessica
Share detailed product brief on new feature (frontline intelligence) next week
